name: Anise Cookie Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter and cream cheese.
2. Add powdered sugar, beating until well blended.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition (the mixture might look curdled).
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients; mix until well combined.
5. Chill dough for 3 hours.
6. Divide soft dough into two halves.
7. On a 17 by 14 inch baking sheet, form each half of dough into a roll that is about 1-1/2 inches wide and extends along the length of the cookie sheet.
8. Bake in a 350 degree Fahrenheit oven for 30 to 35 minutes.
9. Remove from oven and cut rolls into 3/4 inch slices.
10. Place the slices on baking sheets, cut side down, return them to the oven, and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until toasted and crisp.
Makes about 48 slices.
